C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\07_Gameplay.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\07_Gameplay.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\07_Gameplay.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe  -std=c++0x -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\07_Gameplay.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o 07_Gameplay.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib07_Gameplay.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\07_Gameplay.dir\linkLibs.rsp
